Chronic Conditions Warehouse 
CODEBOOK: Medicare Part D Plan Characteristics (2007-2014) │ October 2021 │ V 1.4 225 

PART_D_LIPS_100 

LABEL: Part D Low Income Premium Subsidy 100% 

DESCRIPTION: This variable is the dollar amount of the monthly Part D low-income total premium subsidy (LIPS) for 
beneficiaries at the 100% subsidized level. 

SHORT NAME: — 

LONG NAME: PART_D_LIPS_100 

TYPE: NUM 

LENGTH: 8 

SOURCE: CMS (HPMS Files) 

VALUES: —
